name: Stampy
oneLine: English Minecraft YouTuber whose Stampy's Lovely World was a defining family-friendly let's-play of the 2010s.
bio: Joseph Garrett studied TV and video production at Solent University and created the Stampylongnose channel in 2006 for live-action sketches before launching Stampylonghead in 2011. He began Minecraft let's plays in 2012, and the long-running Stampy's Lovely World became one of the most-watched Minecraft series ever, helping push the channel past 10 million subscribers. After a hiatus, Garrett revived Lovely World in August 2020 and concluded it on October 21, 2023 after 823 episodes.
